doc-physics-1: The Ehrenfest paradox concerns the rotation of a rigid disk in the theory of relativity. It was first formulated by Paul Ehrenfest in 1909. The paradox highlights an apparent contradiction in special relativity when applied to rotating reference frames.
doc-physics-2: Born rigidity is an extension of the concept used to address concerns related to the Ehrenfest paradox. A rotating disk cannot be treated as rigid in the classical sense under relativistic motion.
doc-hr-policy-3: Acme Corp supports remote work through a hybrid model. Employees may work remotely up to three days per week. Full remote arrangements require manager approval and are evaluated quarterly.
